meaning: n.流氓,无赖vt.欺诈vi.流浪,耍无赖,游手好闲
examples: Tell me, impudent little rogue, does your story end here?
Washington insists its shield plan is not directed against Russia but threats from "rogue states" such as Iran.
Mr. Ward wasn't a rogue at all.
Since then, frontman Zach Rogue himself has suffered health problems in the form of a slipped disc.
With the synth-heavy, up-tempo Permalight, Rogue Wave is back in business and powering ahead into sunnier days.
